questions.q: According to a recent study analyzing over 10,500 blood samples, what percentage of Americans were found to have multiple PFAS, or 'forever chemicals,' in their bodies? [1.9]
Recent neurological research reveals that consuming an amount of caffeine equivalent to two cups of coffee does what to the human brain?
options: Enhances the ability to temporarily quiet its own motor signals
Reduces overall memory retention by half
Completely shuts down the prefrontal cortex
questions.correctText: Enhances the ability to temporarily quiet its own motor signals

questions.q: An international study recently concluded that for the first time in human history, what demographic shift has occurred globally?
options: Men are less fertile than women
The global population has started shrinking
Women are retiring an average of five years later than men
Life expectancy for men has surpassed that of women
questions.correctText: Men are less fertile than women

questions.q: A Columbia University School of Nursing AI-assisted audit of nearly 3,000 peer-reviewed medical papers revealed what alarming trend?
options: The papers contained fake citations that do not exist
The studies falsified the ages of their human subjects
The papers were written entirely by artificial intelligence
The authors plagiarized Wikipedia articles word-for-word
questions.correctText: The papers contained fake citations that do not exist

questions.q: A recent study found that how couples divide household chores is linked to women’s sexual desire, but the connection heavily depends on what?
options: The total combined income of the couple
The size and location of their house
How many years they have been married
